Compliance Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
COMPLIANCE HEARING re: CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Jeffrey S. Herman, Esq. of BLUMENTHAL NORDREHAUG BHOWMIK DE BLOUW LLP; Tel: 858.551.1223, for plaintiff;
Zach Hutton, Esq. of PAUL HASTINGS LLP, Tel: 415.856.7000, for defendant.

Hearing held. The parties had nothing to report to the court.

The parties may request another hearing should an issue arise after the holding period expires and the settlement administrator transmits all unclaimed funds to the state controller's office.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Brianna Rudd, CSR#13668, Email: briannarudd@gmail.com, Tel: 209.747.1306. (302/RBU)
